mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, LEFT(regexp_replace(p.content, '<[^>]*>', '', 'g'), 100) AS summary, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.created_at FROM post p JOIN "user" u ON p.author_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 JOIN board b ON p.board_id = b.id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
AND p.board_id = #{query.boardId}
AND (p.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR p.content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND p.is_featured = true ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.hot_score DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.author_id, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.fav_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.status, p.created_at, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, b.description AS board_description, b.icon AS board_icon FROM post p JOIN "user" u ON p.author_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 JOIN board b ON p.board_id = b.id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.author_id, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.fav_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.status, p.created_at, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, b.description AS board_description, b.icon AS board_icon FROM post p JOIN "user" u ON p.author_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 JOIN board b ON p.board_id = b.id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE post SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count + #{delta}, 0) WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE post SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count + #{delta}, 0) WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE post SET fav_count = GREATEST(fav_count + #{delta}, 0) WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE post SET hot_score = (like_count * 3.0 + comment_count * 2.0 + fav_count * 1.0) / POWER(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - created_at)) / 3600 + 2, 1.5) WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, LEFT(regexp_replace(p.content, '<[^>]*>', '', 'g'), 100) AS summary, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_pinned, p.is_featured, p.created_at FROM post p JOIN "user" u ON p.author_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 JOIN board b ON p.board_id = b.id WHERE p.status = 0 AND p.deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT b.name AS boardName, COUNT(p.id) AS postCount FROM board b LEFT JOIN post p ON b.id = p.board_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 GROUP BY b.id, b.name ORDER BY postCount DESC
